title: Lionel Rosenblatt Dies at 82; Led Daring Rescue of Vietnamese Refugees
summary_full: In an unsanctioned mission, the Foreign Service officer helped evacuate about 200 South Vietnamese citizens from Saigon days before the city fell in 1975.
summary_public: In an unsanctioned mission, the Foreign Service officer helped evacuate about 200 South Vietnamese citizens from Saigon days before the city fell in 1975.
